$meta.name: Path of Ambition — Spell Schema
$meta.cost_rule: Base cast costs mana equal to the spell's tier; cantrips cost 0. Each amp adds its listed extra cost on top. spell_cost_modifier boons apply after.

fields.name: string
fields.spheres: string|string[] — lowercase: aberration, augmentation, conjuration, decimation, divination, mortification, reclamation; a caster needs one matching known sphere
fields.sources: string[] — flavor/origin tags: Universal, Mana, Soul, Anima, Primeval
fields.cost: number — base mana cost (= tier, 0 for cantrips)
fields.amps: [{ cost: string (e.g. "+2"), effect: string, stackable?: boolean, stack_max?: number }] — optional extra-mana upgrades; stackable = amp may be applied more than once, stack_max = how many times
fields.reference_only: boolean (optional) — imported entry kept for reference, not player-selectable
